title: cerastium decalvans f. orbelicum
intro: Cerastium decalvans f. orbelicum, also known as the Balkan snow-in-summer, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cerastium decalvans f. orbelicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to address issues related to the respiratory and gastrointestinal systems.
